behavior_summary: U8P_CHOPBLK::look is the object's U8P_CHOPBLK::look/inspection handler. When the player examines the chopping block, it displays a single short bark: "chopping block".
After showing the bark the process issues a suspend (inferred), which likely yields/waits until the player proceeds or the engine continues the process.
No menus, conditions, flags, parameters, locals, or external subsystem calls are present; the routine is purely descriptive UI feedback for inspection.
notable_control_flow: U8P_CHOPBLK::look -> emit a Bark node with text "chopping block".
U8P_CHOPBLK::look -> follow the Bark with a suspend/yield instruction (inferred from the presence of a Suspend/terminate node).

main_function.name: U8P_CHOPBLK::look
main_function.purpose: Provide the short descriptive text when the player examines the chopping block object.
entry_conditions: Invoked by the engine's U8P_CHOPBLK::look/inspect event for this object (process type 0x0208).
Also conceptually triggered when the player enters the object's fast-area for an inspection action (enterFastArea semantics inferred).
